message:
feat(reflect): auto-record rule outcomes from processed sessions (#27)

Close the feedback loop: cm reflect now automatically extracts rule IDs
from session transcripts, classifies outcomes via lightweight heuristics
(diary status, sentiment, error/retry/rejection patterns), and records
implicit feedback against playbook rules — all in a single pass with no
manual cm outcome invocation required.

Also wires up inline feedback extraction (// [cass: helpful b-xyz])
during reflection so explicit agent feedback flows into curation deltas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
